bottleneck.what: The "fix brain first" axiom — belief that everything depends on brain repair
bottleneck.why: Creates an invisible queue where housing, health, career, and relationships all wait for a condition with no clear "done" state. Evidence of parallel progress exists (PMO streak, DMV, 10 properties scored). The axiom is the throttle, not the engine.
bottleneck.unlocked_by: Contacting an agent or completing one workout disproves the axiom in real time — proving parallel progress IS possible.

forecast.bear: Housing stalls, 0 viewings. Exercise gap extends to 16 days. PMO streak at risk as momentum bleeds. WIP paralysis deepens.
forecast.base: 1-2 housing viewings scheduled. 2 exercise sessions logged. PMO streak holds. One maintenance task closed. WIP awareness increases.
forecast.bull: Agent contacted, first viewing completed. 3+ exercise sessions. Sleep tracking begins. tDCS/TMS research produces actionable plan. WIP cut to 5.

top_actions.action: Contact Savannah & Kristy at Schuber Mitchell Homes
top_actions.impact: Unlocks viewings → offers → home ownership pipeline
Reverses health trajectory, directly improves cognition via BDNF/dopamine

top_actions.action: Defer 3 tasks — write 'not this week' list
top_actions.impact: Reduces cognitive load from 13 to 5 active, increases throughput

momentum_analysis.mantra: The jet stream doesn't wait for the engine to be perfect — get in it today.
